item.title: Snap alums unveil Ghost Angels fund
item.dc:creator: Dominic-Madori Davis
item.description: A group of 20 Snap alumni has come together to launch a fund called Ghost Angels to back the next generation of social media.

item.title: ‘What a joke’: Github Copilot’s new token-based billing spurs consternation among devs
item.dc:creator: Lucas Ropek
item.description: The golden age of Microsoft's Github Copilot appears to be at an end.

item.title: Meta is reportedly developing an AI pendant
item.dc:creator: Anthony Ha
item.description: Meta seems to be making big bets on AI-powered hardware.

item.title: I put Google’s 24/7 AI assistant Gemini Spark to work, and it’s actually pretty useful
item.dc:creator: Sarah Perez
item.description: Gemini Spark helps automate everyday tasks, from inbox summaries to local event planning, but it’s unclear why Google made it a separate product.

item.title: The groupthink boom: what three top VCs really think about the AI frenzy
item.dc:creator: Connie Loizos
item.description: "If you're 22 years old in San Francisco and building something in AI, there may be a seed term sheet in your inbox — but if you're 19, oh my God, this means you're really good; you might already have a Series A [offer]," said one, half-kiddingly.

item.title: As the browser wars heat up, here are the hottest alternatives to Chrome and Safari in 2026
item.dc:creator: Lauren Forristal
item.description: We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.

item.title: This $300 pizza oven can easily help elevate your summer pizza nights
item.dc:creator: Aisha Malik
item.description: The Ninja Artisan Outdoor Pizza Oven is aimed at people who want delicious pizza nights without having to deal with things like propane or wood pellets, unlike many other pizza ovens.

item.title: TikTok’s road to becoming a super app
item.dc:creator: Aisha Malik
item.description: TikTok may be working to become the app that people use for most of their digital activities.

item.title: Founders seize on Indian court ruling to revive criticism of Google’s ad business
item.dc:creator: Jagmeet Singh
item.description: The ruling drew support from founders, while lawyers said it could force platforms to revisit how they handle trademarked keywords.

item.title: I went to the so-called ‘steroid Olympics,’ to understand why Silicon Valley is obsessed with peptides
item.dc:creator: Lucas Ropek
item.description: The Enhanced Games — a singular sporting competition where a majority of the athletes were on performance enhancing drugs — may herald a new business model that the tech industry is ready to embrace.

item.title: SpaceX awarded $6.45B in Space Force contracts ahead of IPO
item.dc:creator: Sean O'Kane
item.description: SpaceX already generated one-fifth of its 2025 revenue from government contracts, the company revealed in its IPO filing.

item.title: Coders are refusing to work without AI — and that could come back to bite them
item.dc:creator: Julie Bort
item.description: While AI is helping coders produce code faster, it may not be producing better code, researchers warn. And that could cause problems down the road for them.

item.title: So you’ve heard these AI terms and nodded along; let’s fix that
item.dc:creator: Natasha Lomas, Romain Dillet, Kyle Wiggers, Lucas Ropek
item.description: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.

item.title: What happens when companies become too AI-pilled?
item.dc:creator: Theresa Loconsolo
item.description: The people deciding that AI can replace your job are also the ones least likely to understand what your job truly involves, according to Box founder Aaron Levie, who pointed to this as an example of “AI psychosis.” Indeed, ClickUp recently cut 22% of its workforce for AI agents, tech layoffs in 2026 are already nearly matching all of 2025, […]

item.title: After Nvidia’s $20B not-acqui-hire, AI chip startup Groq reportedly raising $650M
item.dc:creator: Dominic-Madori Davis
item.description: Chipmaker Groq is looking to raise $650 million in internal funding as it pivots from hardware to focus more on AI inference, the process of refining the way AI models respond to prompted requests, per Axios.

item.title: Microsoft under fire for threatening security researcher with criminal investigation
item.dc:creator: Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai
item.description: A public spat between Microsoft and an independent security researcher reopens a long-running debate over who is responsible for securing software.

item.title: Cognition’s Scott Wu says AI coding agents shouldn’t replace humans
item.dc:creator: Julie Bort
item.description: Cognition makes Devin, the first and arguably most successful AI coding agent. But famed coder Wu says it isn't designed to supplant human programmers.

item.title: Today is the last day to apply to speak at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch Events
item.description: Submit your session topic before today ends for a chance to speak at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026. Apply now to share your insight and help shape the conversations defining the tech industry.

item.title: Final 24 hours to save up to $410 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 ticket
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch Events
item.description: You now have until tonight at 11:59 p.m. PT to lock in Early Bird savings of up to $410 for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 before prices increase. Join 10,000+ tech leaders in October for one of the most anticipated tech events of the year. Register now.

item.title: Kiwibit’s AI-powered bird feeder is my new backyard buddy
item.dc:creator: Lauren Forristal
item.description: If you're looking for a fun way to connect with nature while collecting bird species on an app like Pokémon, give this smart feeder a try.
